title: Transportation company collects, discloses passengers' personal information
summary: The Canadian company confirmed that the practice in question has been taking place since December 2000, by agreement among the company, the U.S. transportation company, Canada Customs and Revenue Agency, and USC/USNIS The purpose is to minimize delays at the Canada/U.S. border.
